_comment: Tier-1 clean-corpus checkouts. Cloned by `npm run corpus:fetch` (scripts/fetchCleanCorpus.ts) into checkoutsDir (gitignored — never vendored). Each entry is pinned to an exact commit SHA, never a branch or tag, so upstream movement can neither break the FP gate nor let it drift silently. Gate: `npm run test:corpus:clean` (scripts/checkCleanCorpus.ts), kept out of `npm test` so the default loop stays offline.
